name: Paintbrush Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: If using self-rising flour, omit baking soda and cream of tartar.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix powdered sugar, margarine, vanilla, almond extract, and egg in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients (flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, egg yolk, water) except granulated sugar. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Grease a cookie sheet lightly with butter or cooking spray.
5. Divide the dough in half and shape each portion into a quarter-inch thick rectangle on a lightly floured surface.
6. Cut shapes using 2 to 2-1/2 inch cookie cutters. Do not cut more than 12 cookies at a time to prevent drying out.
7. Mix the egg yolk and water separately, then tint with food coloring in several small custard cups (one for each desired color).
8. Paint designs on the cooled cookies using small paintbrushes.
9. Place the decorated cookies on the prepared baking sheet.
10. Bake for 7 to 8 minutes or until edges are light brown. Allow to cool completely.
Serves: About 5 dozen cookies
Yield: Approximately 65 cookies
